hero.subtext: Experience exceptional dental care in a refined, calming environment. Where advanced techniques meet personalized attention.

about.headline: Dedicated to your comfort and dental excellence
about.p1: Dr. Maha Chaouch combines cutting-edge technology with a gentle, patient-centered approach. Her practice is built on the belief that exceptional dental care should feel luxurious, not clinical.
about.p2: Every treatment is delivered with precision, compassion, and an unwavering commitment to your comfort. From routine care to complex procedures, you'll experience dentistry reimagined.
about.galleryHeadline: A clinic designed for your comfort

services.headline: Comprehensive care for every aspect of your dental health
services.cleaningDesc: First visit, annual check-up and X-rays. Advice for good oral hygiene habits.
services.whiteningDesc: Scaling and polishing to keep your teeth healthy. Guidance on your daily oral care routine.
services.fillingsDesc: Cavity treatment and root canal therapy. Treatments adapted for adults.
services.rootCanalDesc: Teeth whitening. Veneers and aesthetic restorations.
services.crownDesc: Crowns, bridges and removable dentures. Implant placement and follow-up.
services.implantsDesc: Teeth alignment correction without metal braces. Invisible, comfortable and removable clear aligners.
services.cta: Each treatment is tailored to your unique needs, delivered with precision and care.

booking.headline: Schedule your visit with us
booking.subtext: Take the first step towards optimal dental health. Fill out the form and we'll confirm your appointment within 24 hours.
booking.firstNameError: First name must be at least 2 characters
booking.lastNameError: Last name must be at least 2 characters
booking.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
booking.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number
booking.errorMsg: Error booking appointment. Please try again.
booking.successMsg: Thank you for choosing Dr. Maha Chaouch Dental Practice. We'll contact you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Luxury private dental practice offering personalized care in a refined, calming environment.
footer.address: Oryx Medical Center, 2nd floor, Office 2, Avenue Youssef Rouissi, El Manar 2
Oryx Medical Center, Manar 2, Tunis, Tunisia
